title: AP ECET Hall Ticket 2026 - Overview

detail.title: AP ECET Hall Ticket 2026 - Overview
detail.short_info: AP ECET Hall Ticket 2026 is out. Download your AP ECET 2026 admit card using registration number, DOB and qualifying hall ticket number from cets.apsche.ap.gov.in. Check steps, exam date, and instructions here.

content.text: AP ECET Hall Ticket 2026 has been released, and candidates can now download the admit card from the official AP ECET portal using their registration number, qualifying exam hall ticket number, and date of birth.

sections.heading: AP ECET Hall Ticket 2026 - Overview

rows: Andhra Pradesh Engineering Common Entrance Test (AP ECET) 2026
Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Anantapur on behalf of APSCHE
Lateral entry into B.E./B.Tech/B.Pharmacy in Andhra Pradesh colleges
Registration number, qualifying exam hall ticket number, date of birth

content.text: This overview helps candidates quickly understand the key details related to the AP ECET 2026 hall ticket, exam authority and purpose of the test.

sections.heading: AP ECET Hall Ticket 2026 Download Link

content.text: The AP ECET 2026 hall ticket is available only on the official APSCHE CET portal, and candidates must log in to download it.

items: Official AP ECET website: Click Here
Direct hall ticket link:Click Here

content.text: Candidates should always use the official APSCHE domain and avoid third-party login pages to protect their personal data and exam credentials.

sections.heading: How to Download AP ECET Hall Ticket 2026 Online?

content.text: Follow the step-by-step process below to download the AP ECET 2026 hall ticket without errors:

items: Visit the official AP ECET website: cets.apsche.ap.gov.in/ECET.
On the homepage, click on the “Download Hall Ticket / Get Hall Ticket” link.
You will be redirected to the hall ticket login page.
Enter your registration number, qualifying examination hall ticket number and date of birth in the required fields.
Click on the “Submit” or “Download Hall Ticket” button.
Your AP ECET 2026 hall ticket will appear on the screen.
Check all details carefully such as your name, photo, exam date, shift and exam centre.
Download the hall ticket as a PDF and take 2-3 clear A4-size printouts.

content.text: The hall ticket is not sent by post or email, so downloading it online is mandatory for all registered candidates.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on AP ECET 2026 Hall Ticket

content.text: The AP ECET hall ticket carries crucial candidate and exam information that must be verified before the exam day.
Common details printed on the admit card include:

items: Candidate’s name, photograph and signature
AP ECET 2026 registration number and roll number
Course/stream and paper details
Exam date, shift and reporting time
Exam centre name, code and full address
Important exam-day guidelines and instructions

content.text: If any detail appears incorrect or missing, candidates should get it corrected well before the exam day to avoid issues at the test centre.

sections.heading: AP ECET 2026 Exam Date and Schedule
Documents to Carry with AP ECET Hall Ticket 2026

content.text: On the day of the AP ECET 2026 exam, candidates are required to carry the following documents to the exam centre:

items: Printed copy of AP ECET 2026 hall ticket (preferably in colour or clear black-and-white)
Valid photo identity proof such as: Aadhaar Card Voter ID Passport Driving Licence PAN Card
Aadhaar Card
Voter ID
Passport
Driving Licence
PAN Card
Any other document mentioned in the hall ticket instructions, if applicable

content.text: Candidates should avoid carrying banned items like calculators, mobiles, smartwatches, Bluetooth devices, notes or any type of electronic gadgets to the exam hall.

sections.heading: AP ECET 2026 Eligibility (Brief Reminder)

content.text: While the hall ticket article focuses on admit card details, a short eligibility reminder helps users who land on this page through general AP ECET searches.

items: AP ECET is meant for diploma holders in engineering/technology/pharmacy and B.Sc. (Mathematics) graduates seeking lateral entry into second-year B.E./B.Tech/B.Pharmacy courses.
Candidates must have passed or appeared in the final year of their diploma or degree, with required subjects and minimum qualifying marks as prescribed by APSCHE.

content.text: Only candidates who successfully complete the application process and meet the basic eligibility criteria will be issued the AP ECET 2026 hall ticket.

sections.heading: AP ECET Hall Ticket 2026 - Errors and Correction

content.text: Sometimes candidates notice errors in their AP ECET hall ticket after downloading it.
Common issues may include:

items: Spelling mistakes in name or parents’ name
Incorrect photograph or signature
Wrong gender, category or date of birth
Mismatched exam centre or paper details

content.text: In such cases, candidates should immediately contact the AP ECET authorities through the official helpline or email mentioned on the website. They must raise the issue at the earliest and keep relevant proof (like application form, ID documents) ready for verification.

sections.heading: AP ECET Hall Ticket 2026 - Important Instructions for Exam Day

content.text: The instructions printed on the AP ECET 2026 hall ticket are mandatory and must be followed strictly.
Key exam-day guidelines:

items: Reach the exam centre at least 60-90 minutes before the reporting time to complete frisking and verification smoothly.
Carry your AP ECET hall ticket and valid photo ID; without these, entry to the exam hall will not be allowed.
Do not bring electronic gadgets, notes, calculators or any prohibited items inside the exam centre.
Follow the directions of the invigilators and obey all rules regarding seating, biometric verification and logging into the exam system.
Candidates should not write anything on the admit card or rough sheets other than what is instructed in the exam hall.

content.text: After the exam, candidates are advised to keep the hall ticket safe, as it may be required during counselling and admission.

sections.heading: AP ECET 2026 Official Website and Helpline

content.text: For any official update, correction request or clarification about AP ECET 2026 hall ticket, candidates should refer only to the authorised portals and contacts.

items: AP ECET official website: Click Here

content.text: The detailed helpdesk information (phone numbers, email IDs and working hours) is usually mentioned in the official AP ECET information brochure and on the website’s contact section, and candidates should use only those contact points for support.
